name: @levitate/tui-kit
description: Reusable terminal UI primitives for LevitateOS

scripts.build: bun run clean && bunx tsc -p tsconfig.json
scripts.format: oxfmt --write src tests examples package.json tsconfig.json
scripts.format:check: oxfmt --check src tests examples package.json tsconfig.json
scripts.check: bun run typecheck && bun run test
scripts.precommit: bun run format:check && bun run lint && bun run typecheck && bun run test
